title: BreadBoard Approval Decision v1
description: Recorded allow/deny decision for an approval request.

approval_id.description: Approval request identifier this decision resolves.

decider.description: Actor or subsystem that made the decision.

decided_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the decision was made.

policy_source.description: Policy source or ruleset that produced/authorized the decision.

signature.description: Optional signature or verification artifact for provenance.
